reviews.review_description: I downloaded this game when it came out in 2022, I had a blast! But now i see it has had no updates since 2023, man…
Walking in this game was horrible, the jumping was clunky, got stuck under the map twice, didn’t even move my arms and I was moving, overall horrible

developer_response.body: Sorry you had that experience. The way you describe it should not have happend. We just started into beta so please bear with us while we fix these issues as quickly as possible.

reviews.review_description: So this game is great I got to say but I have stick drift on my left controller so the whole time I’m playing I’m just spinning for days please make this toggle able so it can be no Turning Smooth Ect

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will make sure to add this as soon as possible into our options menu :)

reviews.review_description: I would be a great game but when ever I join a lobby my screen turns black.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. We are currently working quickly to fix this very issue

reviews.review_description: Pp
When you try to move it flings you everywhere, I would not recommend this game AT ALL!

developer_response.body: Sorry about that. There are still some kinks to iron out in this beta. We are working hard to make it better and will let you know once we make progress

reviews.review_description: Needs better movement, more tutorials, because i cant figure out almost anything, and better main menu.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are absolutely working on all the points that you addressed. This is a beta version to be able to get early player feedback and we are committed to improving all aspects of the game over time with helpful feedback like yours. Do come back regularly to see what we have in store through our updates :)

reviews.review_description: Hi devs if your reading this I would like to say your game is really good, but I've had a problem sometimes if I'm moving in one place I clip through the ground and have to restart but that's about it. fun game

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback. This is an issue that we are aware of and are currently trying to fix. The physics simulation is acting up here but we are working on it to dial everything in :)

reviews.review_description: It doesn’t even work
Server Do not work

It’s very nice looking, and the movement is great, but there are just not enough players for multiplayer to work. As multiplayer is basically compulsory in this kind of game, it is definitely a big problem
Miss this game

This game (though needing a whole lot of work) was really fun! Movement could be better, there could be more gamemodes, private servers are a must add. But this game is really cool and very fun! Please give it a try don't trust all the reviews you see.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for you kind words. High five! We do agree there is still a lot of work to be done and we are constantly pushing updates to make this game better.

reviews.review_description: This game made me want to blow my brains out with a remington 800 on the owners kids birthday so I traumatize him for life,great game 😁

reviews.review_title: I only found like one player that’s’s it
reviews.review_description: When I got the game no one was in there literally there’s no players￼

developer_response.body: Hey Skull, sorry you couldn't find more players. At the moment we don't have enough players yet so there is always someone online. Your best chances are during afternoon/evening times for the US. (Also, positive reviews help to get more players in ;) )

reviews.review_description: This game has great mechanics good gameplay but there are a few problems 1: you can’t turn vignette off and it’s real annoying 2: no one is online so have stuff you can do by your self 3: when you fall really fast you can move your arms other then those 3 things good job! *update* ok things are better and people are online so I gues it’s just the viginette thingy and you told me you were working on that so the game is good!

developer_response.body:
We just released the update 0.3 which allows you to turn off the vignette.
Open the in-game menu and press the gear icon on the top right. Thank you for your messages :) High five!

reviews.review_description: Whenever trying to join a server you get a black screen would rate 0 stars if possible no content.

developer_response.body: Sorry about that. We are aware of this issue and are working hard to get it fixed.

reviews.review_description: Whenever I load into the game I go to high five the hand but when I do it doesn’t tp me like the first time so I would just be in the lobby and everything’s black.

developer_response.body: Hi SirBenis, we are currently working on some server issues to get this resolved as quickly as possible. We actually published a small update last night, can you check if this maybe already resolved your issue? Thank you for helping out to make this game ARMazing!

reviews.review_description: Tip this is way better then gorilla tag

developer_response.body: You are very kind. We love gorilla tag too though!

reviews.review_description:
This game is really, really good, best Gorilla Tag style game I’ve ever seen, good graphics, great player interactions. Overall a really good game.

Also, are you accepting mods, cause I would love to be a mod.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad you are enjoying it even in this early state. Definitely keep coming back for all the updates that we have planned :)
